deviations.description: The process model enforces that both physical examination and blood test must precede diagnosis, as shown by the explicit sequence in the process diagram on page 1. Version 2 relaxes this requirement, permitting diagnosis even if these steps have not been performed. The process model continues to enforce outdated constraints, restricting behavior beyond what is required by Version 2.
process_model_reference: Make Diagnosis (requires prior Physical Examination and Blood Analysis Results)

deviations.description: The process model requires a blood test before diagnosis, as indicated by the sequence from 'Draw Blood Samples' and 'Blood Analysis Results' to 'Make Diagnosis' in the process diagram on page 1. This is no longer required in Version 2, but the process still enforces it.
process_model_reference: Make Diagnosis (requires prior Blood Analysis Results)
